channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 52/100 (building)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 52/100 (building). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 6.5%.

item.title: The Telegraph: What an Andy Burnham premiership would look like - The Telegraph
item.description: What an Andy Burnham premiership would look like - The Telegraph

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: My post on why prime ministers keep failing.
And three big things that the next PM can change that will make their job easier.
samf.substack.com/p/why-do-pri...
item.description:
My post on why prime ministers keep failing.
And three big things that the next PM can change that will make their job easier.
samf.substack.com/p/why-do-pri...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I will never understand how Keir reconciles his self-conception as a good man doing a good job as prime minister with “my premiership had to be brought to the brink of death for me to say this”.
item.description: I will never understand how Keir reconciles his self-conception as a good man doing a good job as prime minister with “my premiership had to be brought to the brink of death for me to say this”.

item.title: The Times: Rivals told to skip leadership contest if Andy Burnham wins by-election - The Times
item.description: Rivals told to skip leadership contest if Andy Burnham wins by-election - The Times

item.title: ITVX: Andy Burnham can stand in Makerfield by-election, Labour ruling body says - ITVX
item.description: Andy Burnham can stand in Makerfield by-election, Labour ruling body says - ITVX

item.title: The Guardian: ‘An hour of abuse’: Jeremy Corbyn on Labour coups, and whether he feels sorry for Starmer - The Guardian
item.description: ‘An hour of abuse’: Jeremy Corbyn on Labour coups, and whether he feels sorry for Starmer - The Guardian

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham cleared to run for selection in pivotal by-election
item.description: Burnham cleared to run for selection in pivotal by-election

item.title: Reuters: Starmer expected to approve $24 billion increase in UK defence spending, The Times reports - Reuters
item.description: Starmer expected to approve $24 billion increase in UK defence spending, The Times reports - Reuters

item.title: Sky News Politics: Andy Burnham gets green light to run for selection in by-election
item.description: Andy Burnham gets green light to run for selection in by-election

item.title: The Times: Keir Starmer ‘in the bunker’ as he weighs up his future - The Times
item.description: Keir Starmer ‘in the bunker’ as he weighs up his future - The Times
